scripts.build: node scripts/apply-seo.mjs && node scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs && node scripts/build-static.mjs
scripts.cf:ci: node scripts/workers-ci-build.mjs && npx wrangler pages deploy public --project-name=parama
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy public --project-name=parama
scripts.pages:deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy public --project-name=parama
